name: @dotta
description: Creator of Paperclip, the AI coding agent runtime. Posts from direct build experience, not commentary. Detailed on failure modes and system design.
reviewNote: Original work, specific, testable. One of the few practitioners posting real architectural decisions with real trade-offs.

name: @shipper_now
description: Documents the process of shipping products fast with agentic workflows. Operational specifics, not theory.
reviewNote: Consistent original output about build velocity and agentic tooling. Shows the work.

name: @swyx
description: AI engineer and writer. Runs latent.space. Tracks the infrastructure and capability curve of LLM tooling with engineer-level rigor.
reviewNote: Deep research, well-sourced, transparent about uncertainty. One of the best for understanding where the stack is heading.

name: @karpathy
description: First principles explanations of how LLMs and agents actually work. Posts from direct research and implementation experience.
reviewNote: Foundational. Anyone building with LLMs should have a working understanding of what Karpathy publishes.
